component.name: OpenWheel
component.summary: Creative dial controller for the ASUS ProArt Dial

description.p: OpenWheel is a Wayland-native driver and overlay UI for the ASUS ProArt Dial — the rotary input device built into ProArt Studiobook laptops. It works on GNOME and KDE Plasma without requiring X11, ydotool, or root access.

ul.li: Floating HUD overlay showing the current function and value
Per-application profiles (system, music, workspaces, Blender, Krita)
Press-to-activate mode: actions only fire while the button is held
Window switcher with sticky Alt+Tab via long-press and rotation
Volume and brightness via PipeWire/logind — no polling
Settings window to remap functions without editing JSON
All keystrokes injected via /dev/uinput — works on any Wayland compositor
Music, Workspaces, Blender, Krita bundled profiles
Settings window with enable/disable per profile
